details.productUrlName: A Good Day to Pie Galaxy Foil

customAttributes.description:
Tap up to two target creatures.
Whenever you put a name sticker on a creature, you may return A Good Day to Pie from your graveyard to your hand.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"What could be funnier than one big pie to the face? Unless...no. Could it be that simple?"
—Pietra, Crafter of Clowns
